title: VACCINES AND IMMUNIZATION - 211info
text: UMATILLA COUNTY HERMISTON CLINIC VACCINES AND IMMUNIZATION Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides childhood immunizations and some adult immunizations. Offers influenza (flu) vaccines as they become available each season, along with vaccine information. 180 NE 2nd Street Suite 23 Hermiston, OR 97838 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Tuesday-Friday 9am-3:30pm Email (541) 567-3113 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (541) 567-3113 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call for information and to schedule an appointment FEES: Accepts OHP and most private insurance, sliding scale fees offered to uninsured patients. No child will be turned away for inability to pay. DOCUMENTS: Immunization record and insurance information, if available LANGUAGES: English, Spanish, interpretation by arrangement AREA SERVED: Umatilla County Services: Childhood Immunization Flu Vaccines Vaccine Information Other Services Offered At This Location: HUMAN REPRODUCTION - OREGON REPRODUCTIVE HEALTH PROGRAM CLINIC INDIVIDUAL AND FAMILY SUPPORT SERVICES - BABIES FIRST! SPECIALIZED TREATMENT AND PREVENTION - TUBERCULOSIS PROGRAM SUBSTANCE USE DISORDER SERVICES - TOBACCO CESSATION COUNSELING If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. UMATILLA COUNTY HERMISTON CLINIC
